ops.body: Parked 2026-07-16 evening: a concurrent session's mcp.json pack migration holds exactly this task's files in the cc-skills working copy (manifest.py, scaffold.py, templates/*, test_scaffold.py, test_swift.py, test_guides_fragments.py — still dirty at last check). Everything upstream is ready: yml fragments live on cc-skills main (precommit-{base,go,python,swift}), cc-guides 0.1.27 accepts .yaml targets, and the layout.toml shape is proven in 27 retrofit repos (import cc-skills:precommit-base + language fragment; dest .claude/fragments/.pre-commit-config.yaml/layout.toml; swift-app FileSpec points at the swift template). Pick this up once the mcp.json migration lands; expect FileSpec swaps at the four manifest.py pre-commit lines plus test updates per the plan (~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/ccx-vcs-ship-should-declarative-turing.md §P4).
